titleStmt.title: SII 20.52: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 52. (B.K. No. 6 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒS11VAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the backyard of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: This record, written in Sanskrit and Kannaḍa languages, is dated Śaka 969 (in words), Chālukya-Vikrama year 2, Piṅgala, Āshāḍha śu. 12, Wednesday corresponding regularly to A.D. 1077 July 5. There is a second date in the record the details of which are Śaka 1000, Kālayukta, Madhumāsa (Chaitra) Amāvāsya, Sunday. This corresponds to A.D. 1078, April 14. Saturday, on which day the tithi ended at ·90.

This inscription records the death of Śrīnandi-Paṇḍitadēva of Sūrastra-gaṇa by the rite of Sallēkhanā observed for one month at Anesejjeya-basadi at Purikaranagara. It also records the death on the second date of Bhāskaranandi-Paṇḍita who is said to have been the elder brother of the former.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śriyaṁ kriyāsurjjagatāmadhīśvarāssamantabhadrāmakaḷaṁkaniścaḷāṁ . tamōpa yajinēndrabhā
navaḥ sphuranti vō yannayamānabhānavaḥ © svasti śrīmūḷasaṁghaprathitapṛthutapō samyaktvabōdhādhva
stājñānānandakārairavibhiriva karaissūribhiṟpāramīran nyastānēkāntavasū ca yaracata guṇaścitrahā
rāyitaśrīḥ śastassūrastavaṁśaḥ śamabhuvi samabhūdārhatē rōhaṇādrau . sākṣātparvva jñakaḷpai
ssuranaramahitaiḻpūjyapādādi pūjyaistatkṣīṇāśēṣadōṣairavatarati mahīmaṇḍaḷē khaṇḍaṣaṇḍaṁ
mōkṣaśrēṇyagraṇyastadanu munirabhūduttarāsaṁgyaghaughaṁ prakṣipyāstraisuratnaiḥ śamitanutaśa
māvānvayē tatra citraṁ . jātastasyāpi śiṣyaḥ kavijanakamaḷānandakandapratānībhūtassarnmāggamārggē
budhajanasadanaṁ bhāskarādyantanandi śrīnandīdēvanandī kimayamiti janaiḥ śaṁśitō tasya śiṣyō nūnaṁ bhaṭṭākaḷa
ṅkaḥ kaliyugajaḍatāmuddharannaiyayēṣaḥ . bhēttā saṁsārabhittēssakaḷasukhanivāsārggamārggasya vēttā
cchēttāvidyāvibhūtērnnijaparasamayavyaktaśēṣasya vaktā bharttā ratnatrayasya vratacitatapasāṁ tāpa
sānāṁ mahimnā harttā kandarppaśatrōssamajani munipō vādibhēruṇḍanāmnā . kīrttirnnarnnartti yasya tribhu
vanabhavanē bhāvatō raṅgarāgē mūrttirmō mūrtti yasya sthirabharatapasāmudvahantī na bhāraiḥ . pūrttissadvā
kṣu yasya prasarati bahudhā bhūpasabhyēṣu mōghaṁ kīrttiḥ śrīnandidēvaprabhuriha jagatāṁ varṇyatē varṇnabṛ
ndaiḥ . Auddhatyaṁ vijahīhi bauddha jahihi tvaṁ kharvvagarvvāspadaṁ mīmāṁsinvijahāhi durmmadamadō naiyāyika tvaṁ
kutaḥ syādvādōtthitadurddharōddhatanayagrāhāgrahagrāhitaśrīnandigrahapīḍitōsi bhavasi tvaṁ tantrayantra
grathaḥ . śrutvā śabdādiśāstraṁ nayagahanaguhāgahvarāntaṁ praviṣṭō jitvā vādānkathābhirddiśi diśi visṛtā vādinō vā
maśēṣāḥ taptvāghōrāstapasyāściracitamadhunā dhūtamaṁhaḥ saraṁhaḥ sthitvā bhādvīta cintaḥ purikaranagarē kiṁ kṛ
tārtthasya kṛtyaṁ . bhūtē śakābdacātē navanavanavakē vikramāṅkē dvitīyē śvētē pakṣējñavārē dinapamitadinē pi
ṅgaḷē śukramāsē śāntassanyāsayōgātpariṣadi yamināṁ nāgaśayyāvasatyāṁ jātaḥ śrīnandidēvaḥ svama
ravaravadhūlōcanānāṁ salakṣaṁ . sāhasrīṣu gatāsu śākasamayē caitrasya kṛṣṭē caturddaśyāṁ kāḷayujē
ndramantriṇi gatō dēhaṁ vihāya svayaṁ . svarggastrīnayanōtpaḷākaramiva sthātuṁ kaniṣṭhātpunaḥ śrīmānbhāskarana
ndipaṇḍitapatiścitraṁ mahaccēṣṭitaṁ . vaktāvāgnitayā kavitvatatayā vādasya jātā śataṁ samyagjñāna caritranētra
tapasāṁ sāmājya sampatpadaṁ . Arādhyōpagataścaturvidhatamāmārādhanāmārhatīṁ dēvīṁ bhāskaranandipaṇḍita
patirddēvāṅganāsaṅgamaṁ . bhavyābjaṁ kumudaṁ cakāsti kumudaṁ vidyāsirassambhavaṁ kāśānnīrajatāmadhicchati budhai
ścakrāṅkakājīvinaḥ . kṛcchrādbhāskaranandipaṇḍitapadau jātē parāsau jaganmitrē mitratayā prabhāvini kutassaṁjīva
naṁ jīvināṁ . Itthaṁ taumunipuṁṅgavauhi jagatāṁ nētrē budhānāṁ patī nityōdbāsitapuṣpadantagaṇanau svārtthārtthinau tīrtthinau
yātau svarggamagājjagajjanamidaṁ niṣprāṇabhūyaṁ kutō yaistaijīvati jīva lōka Ihahi prāṇairvinā prāṇeti .
Adeṁteṁdoḍakhiḷakuvaḷayakuvaḷayānanda karaśrījinēndra candravākcandrikāprasaraprasāditasūrastanabhasthaḷā
ḷankaraṇaruṁ . vijitakaraṇaruṁ . kumatamativitarkkitatarkkakarkkaśajaḷpānaḷpakathāprōtha vitaṇḍāparaparavādiśarabha
bhēruṇḍaruṁ . nirastanikhiḷatamaḻpiṁḍaruṁ . tāratārācaḷanīhārahārakṣīrakūpārāmara vēdaṇḍapuṇḍarīkakāśākā
śaśaṁkhaśaśāṁkaviśadayaśaḻpiṇḍamaṇḍitatribhuvanaruṁ . ratnatrayaprabhāprabhāvitanijamanōbhavanaruṁ . sakaḷa
nṛpatimakuṭataṭaghaṭitamaṇigaṇakiraṇamasṛṇitanakhakiraṇacaraṇakamaḷayugaḷaparicaraṇapariṇatabhavabhṛdagha
ghanapaṭaḷavighaṭanapaṭutamasaṁtatagatigaḷumapagatabhavagahanaparisaraṇakaraṇavitatakumatigaḷumindriyamadāndasindhūragha ṭā
vighaṭanasyādvādanayaguhāgarjjadurjjayasiṁharuṁ . niraṁharumapva śrī śrīnandipaṇḍitadēvarjjīvitārādhanāpurassara māsasallēkhaneyiṁ
dvidinasanyāsāvasānadoḷ śakanṛpakāḷātītasaṁvatsaraṁgaḷoṁbaynūṟatoṁbatoṁbatāge vikramābhyudayaderaḍeneya piṁgaḷa saṁvatsaradā
ṣāḍhaśuddhadvādaśibudhavāradandukuntaḷaviṣayadapurikaranagarībhāḷalīḷātiḷakāḷaṁkāramādānesejjeya basadiyoḷ caturvvidhārādhaneyi
nārādhisi guruparamēṣṭhicaraṇānusmaraṇapūrvvakamarhadbījamaṁ hṛtpadmasadmadoḷ niścaḷamirisi yōgasamādhānādhīnacittarāgi śa
mitaparityāgadinamaralōkāvaḷōkanakautukadiṁ dēvalōkakke vijayangeydaravariṁ piriyarāgiyumanujātesnēhānugṛhītā
nucararappa bhāskaranandipaṇḍitapatigaḷuṁ sahasrāṁtika śaka kāḷayuktābda madhumāsāvasānadoḷamāvāsiyumādityavāra
mumāge yathōktavidhiyinindrapurātithigaḷādaridu tadbhaktivatsaḷabhavyajanasamuttaṁbhita stambha .
Digital edition of SII 20.52 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
